title: Please support BUFT cell types for xilinx architecture.

features.name: tri-state buffer with always block and ternary operator
features.description: Code should include a tri-state buffer implementation using an always block with a ternary conditional operator and high-impedance state

features.name: procedural continuous assignment to reg
features.description: Code should include a procedural continuous assignment to a register output using non-blocking assignment in an always block

features.name: tristate instantiation for xilinx synthesis
features.description: Code should include a tristate buffer module instantiation being synthesized with synth_xilinx target
